name: Gladimon

signature_move.name: Wheel Rush
signature_move.description: Performs a spinning slash with the rapiers in its hands.

description: A novice Warrior Digimon that is active on the front line s of the battlefield. It moves quickly due to having a small physique and being lightly equipped, and cuts its way into enemy lines as a scout. It also specializes in tactics where it creates formations in collaboration with its comrades, so its combat ability when in a platoon is high as well. It is said that only those who continue to win on the battlefield evolve into great warriors. Its Special Moves are performing a spinning slash with the rapiers in its hands ( Wheel Rush ), and mincing the enemy with its long arms as if it were dancing ( Sword Dancer ).
